title: Escape the Backrooms
description: This mod adds 5 levels of the backrooms! On future updates even more.
body:
# BACKROOMS!!!!! this mod adds a ton of content like some levels, some blocks and some decorations
all in all its not much but its honest work! ## Levels: - **Level 0 (Lobby) _(not fully done)_** ![The iconic backrooms image recreated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64c3eb75e96e4561d047e96d74aea158687525c9_0.webp) - **Level 37 (Sublimity/Poolrooms) _(Very early in development)_ (no images :C)** - **level 2 (Pipe dreams) _(Will be done by 0.8.0)_** - **level 1 (Habitable zone) _(Will be done by 0.8.0)_** ## Info If you want to add your own levels: sadly that is not possible with the current state of the mod, but if enough people want to add their own levels ill make the "api" easier to use! This mod was developed for the [Escape the Backrooms Minecraft Server](https://discord.gg/tyV8ZrRDFya), if you want to use it please contact me [here](https://discord.gg/EKYbRGR9hy) :D
